steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The sentence says "nobody can ever ______ the standing of these women as the first." Their standing is permanent — the blank needs a word for an action that would damage or weaken that standing but cannot.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — undermine: means to weaken or erode from beneath — exactly the kind of harm their permanent status is protected against. ✓
  • Choice B — imply: means to suggest indirectly. Saying nobody can 'imply' their standing makes no logical sense here. ✗
  • Choice C — extend: means to lengthen or expand — not a harmful action, and unrelated to protecting their standing. ✗
  • Choice D — promote: means to advance or support — the opposite of undermining, and the sentence describes a threat, not a benefit. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
